---
title: "Second wave of COVID-19 in Switzerland"
author: "Marta Mainetti"
date: "`r date()`"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: show
    code-tools: true
    df-print: paged
  pdf:
    toc: true
  docx:
    toc: true
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

```{r, echo = FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
#| fig-cap: 
#| label: 
#| fig-width:
#| fig-height:
```

[named hyperlinks](https://quarto.org/)
